meta.description: Named NPC definitions with dialogue trees for Project Horizons

greetings.default: Welcome to Anchor Town, Pathfinder. I've been waiting for you.
greetings.act_1_complete: You've come far since we first met. The world opens before you.
greetings.act_2_started: Willowmere awaits. Mayor Theron has much to discuss.
greetings.act_3_started: The kingdoms stir. Your choices will shape their future.
greetings.act_4_started: The stars call to you now. Be careful out there.
greetings.act_5_started: It's nearly time. Choose wisely, Pathfinder.

welcome_pathfinder.offer: You look lost. Everyone does at first. Let me help you get oriented.
welcome_pathfinder.accept: Good. First things first - eat something, drink some water, find shelter.
welcome_pathfinder.decline: Take your time. I'll be right here when you're ready.
welcome_pathfinder.complete: Well done! You're a quick learner. There's much more ahead.

find_sera.offer: Now that you've gotten your bearings, let me tell you about this place.
find_sera.accept: Anchor Town is the heart of the Plains Kingdom. Guild Master Aren runs things here.
find_sera.decline: Explore on your own if you like. Curiosity is a fine teacher.
find_sera.complete: You're ready to meet Aren. He's in the Guild Hall - the big building with the banner.

faction_responses.rep_plains_trusted: The Plains folk speak highly of you. You've earned their trust.
faction_responses.rep_forest_hostile: I hear the Forest Coalition isn't fond of you. Be careful.
faction_responses.crime_outlaw: I've heard rumors. Whatever path you've chosen, be careful.

idle_lines: Beautiful day in Anchor Town, isn't it?
Have you tried the bread from the bakery? It's wonderful.
The Gate to the east has been active lately. Be cautious.
Every Pathfinder who comes through here has a different story. I wonder what yours will be.
If you're ever lost, just look for the guild banner. You can always find your way home.

greetings.default: Hear ye, hear ye! A new Pathfinder walks among us! Welcome, stranger!
greetings.act_1_complete: Extra, extra! The Pathfinder has completed their first trials! The town buzzes with talk of you!
greetings.act_2_started: News from Willowmere! Trade routes opening and the Pathfinder is at the center of it all!
greetings.act_3_started: Tensions rise between the kingdoms! All eyes turn to you, Pathfinder!
greetings.act_4_started: Strange lights in the sky! The Skyborn Order sends expeditions! What times we live in!
greetings.act_5_started: The world holds its breath. Whatever happens next, they'll write songs about it.

deliver_news_willowmere.offer: I've got urgent dispatches for Mayor Theron in Willowmere. The road's too dangerous for me alone. Would you carry them?
deliver_news_willowmere.accept: Bless you! Take the south road and stay clear of the ravine after dark. Theron will know what to do with these.
deliver_news_willowmere.decline: I understand. Maybe I'll find another courier. Or maybe the news will just have to wait.
deliver_news_willowmere.complete: You delivered them safely? Wonderful! Here's your courier's fee, well earned.

gather_stories.offer: I'm putting together a chronicle of the kingdoms. Would you bring me stories from your travels? Talk to folk in other towns and report back.
gather_stories.accept: Marvelous! I need tales from at least three different settlements. The more colorful, the better!
gather_stories.decline: No rush. Stories aren't going anywhere, and neither am I.
gather_stories.complete: These are magnificent! The people need to hear these. You have a gift for finding the heart of a story.

faction_responses.rep_plains_trusted: The Plains folk love a good headline, and you've given them plenty!
faction_responses.rep_mountain_allied: Word from the Mountain Forge says you're making quite a name for yourself up there!
faction_responses.crime_outlaw: I, uh, haven't heard anything about you. Nope. Nothing at all. Please don't hurt me.

idle_lines: Read all about it! New trade route opens between the Plains and the Coast!
Have you heard? A rare Pokemon was spotted near the eastern gate!
News never sleeps, and neither do I! Well, sometimes I do. A little.
Psst - between you and me, I hear the Mountain Forge is working on something big.

greetings.default: Another Pathfinder. Step forward. I am Aren, Guild Master of Anchor Town. Your journey begins here - if you have the resolve.
greetings.act_1_complete: You've proven yourself capable. Good. I have need of capable people. The real work begins now.
greetings.act_2_started: Willowmere's stability is critical to the Plains Kingdom. I'm trusting you with this, Pathfinder.
greetings.act_3_started: The factions are fracturing. Diplomacy has failed before. Don't let it fail again.
greetings.act_4_started: What the Skyborn have discovered changes everything. I need you ready for what comes next.
greetings.act_5_started: This is it. Everything we've built, every alliance we've forged - it all comes down to what you do next.

meet_the_guild.offer: Before you go charging into the wild, you need training. I've arranged for three mentors to evaluate you. Speak with Vex, Lyra, and Tomo.
meet_the_guild.accept: Good. Each will teach you a discipline. Master all three and you'll be ready for what this world demands.
meet_the_guild.decline: Hesitation is not always weakness, but don't mistake caution for cowardice. Come back when you're ready.
meet_the_guild.complete: All three mentors speak well of you. That's rare. You've earned your place in the Guild.

the_first_expedition.offer: Willowmere has gone silent. No trade caravans, no messengers. I need you to find out why and report back.
the_first_expedition.accept: Take supplies and keep your wits about you. Something is wrong on that road.
the_first_expedition.decline: I won't force you. But if Willowmere falls, Anchor Town won't be far behind.
the_first_expedition.complete: So that's what happened. This is worse than I feared. We need to act quickly.

forge_alliance.offer: The kingdoms must unite or fall separately. I need you to carry my seal to the Mountain Forge and the Coastal Republic. Negotiate treaties.
forge_alliance.accept: You carry the authority of the Plains Kingdom with you. Do not squander it.
forge_alliance.decline: Without alliances, we stand alone. Think carefully before you refuse.
forge_alliance.complete: Treaties signed. Alliances forged. You've done what diplomats couldn't. Well done.

the_final_stand.offer: Everything comes to a head now. The threat we've been preparing for is here. Rally our allies and lead the defense.
the_final_stand.accept: This is what you were born for, Pathfinder. All of Horizons stands behind you.
the_final_stand.decline: I understand your fear. But there is no one else. Take a moment, then come back. We need you.
the_final_stand.complete: You did it. Against all odds, you did it. Horizons endures because of you.

faction_responses.rep_plains_trusted: You've earned the trust of the Plains. That carries weight in this hall.
faction_responses.rep_all_allied: Every kingdom speaks your name with respect. That is no small feat.
faction_responses.crime_outlaw: I've heard troubling reports. I gave you my trust, Pathfinder. Don't make me regret it.

idle_lines: The Guild exists to protect this world. Never forget that.
Strategy wins battles. Strength alone is not enough.
I've seen many Pathfinders come and go. The ones who endure are the ones who listen.

greetings.default: So you're the new Pathfinder. You don't look like much. Let's see what you're made of.
greetings.act_1_complete: Still standing, huh? Maybe there's hope for you after all.
greetings.act_2_started: Willowmere isn't a training ground. Stay sharp or you'll be someone's lunch.
greetings.act_3_started: War's coming. I can smell it. Hope you've been practicing.
greetings.act_5_started: This is what we trained for. Every bruise, every early morning. Make them count.

vanguard_trial.offer: The Vanguard path is about strength, grit, and never backing down. Think you can handle it? Prove it. Bring me trophies from three hostile mobs.
vanguard_trial.accept: Good. Don't come back empty-handed. And don't come back dead - I hate paperwork.
vanguard_trial.decline: Coward. Come back when you grow a spine.
vanguard_trial.complete: Huh. Not bad. You might just survive out there. Welcome to the Vanguard path, kid.

advanced_combat.offer: Basic combat won't cut it anymore. I'm going to teach you to fight smart. First, craft a proper weapon - iron tier or better.
advanced_combat.accept: A warrior is only as good as their blade. Forge it yourself and you'll understand your weapon.
advanced_combat.decline: Your funeral. Don't blame me when something bigger than you shows up.
advanced_combat.complete: Fine craftsmanship. You're learning that the forge is as important as the battlefield.

faction_responses.rep_plains_trusted: The Plains warriors respect you. That means something coming from them.
faction_responses.rep_mountain_allied: Mountain Forge folk say you can fight. High praise from smiths.
faction_responses.crime_outlaw: I don't care what the law says. I care if you can fight. But clean up your act.

idle_lines: A dull blade and a dull mind will both get you killed.
I've been fighting since before you were born. Literally.
Train every day. No exceptions. Your enemies don't take days off.
The best armor in the world won't save you from stupidity.

greetings.default: Oh! A new face! Welcome, welcome! Have you ever seen a Create contraption before? No? Oh, you are going to LOVE this!
greetings.act_1_complete: You're back! I've been working on something new - the gears keep jamming but I think if I reverse the polarity of the- oh, right, hello!
greetings.act_2_started: Willowmere needs infrastructure! Waterways, conveyor systems, automated farms - oh, the possibilities!
greetings.act_3_started: I've been studying the Mountain Forge's techniques. If we combine their metallurgy with our mechanics... extraordinary!
greetings.act_5_started: I've built something for the final push. It's my masterwork. I hope it's enough.

artificer_trial.offer: The Artificer path is about invention, creativity, and making things that go whirrrr! Build me a basic Create mechanism - anything that moves!
artificer_trial.accept: Brilliant! Don't worry about perfection. Worry about whether it spins! Or clicks! Or both!
artificer_trial.decline: Oh. That's okay! The machines will be here when you change your mind. They always wait.
artificer_trial.complete: IT MOVES! Oh, look at that beautiful rotation! You're a natural! Welcome to the Artificer path!

power_grid.offer: Anchor Town needs reliable power. I've designed a rotational power grid but I need someone to gather the components. Gears, shafts, and cogwheels - lots of them!
power_grid.accept: Wonderful! The spec sheet is in my workshop. Don't mind the scorch marks - minor explosion, totally controlled.
power_grid.decline: No worries! I'll just keep using the hamster wheel. Mr. Whiskers doesn't seem to mind.
power_grid.complete: The grid is online! Listen to that hum! That beautiful, mechanical hum! You've powered up the whole town!

stellaris_prototype.offer: The Mountain Forge has something called Stellaris alloy. If I can get a sample, I could build machines that run on starlight. STARLIGHT! Would you retrieve some for me?
stellaris_prototype.accept: High Smith Khael guards it jealously, but tell him Lyra sent you. He owes me for that gear assembly.
stellaris_prototype.decline: I understand. Stellaris is dangerous stuff. But oh, the things we could build with it...
stellaris_prototype.complete: Stellaris alloy in my hands at last! Oh, the machines I'll build! The future starts today!

faction_responses.rep_plains_trusted: The town loves what we've built together! Every gear and piston, a testament to progress!
faction_responses.rep_mountain_allied: The Mountain Forge engineers respect our work! Cross-faction collaboration is the future!
faction_responses.crime_outlaw: I don't really understand politics, but please don't break my machines. They're very sensitive.

idle_lines: If it doesn't have at least three gears, it's not interesting enough.
I once built a machine that could peel potatoes at four hundred per minute. The kitchen staff was not pleased.
Create mod mechanics are basically magic. Better than magic, actually. Magic doesn't have gears.
Ooh, do you hear that clicking? That's the sound of progress!
I haven't slept in three days. The machines needed me. Worth it.

greetings.default: Ah, a new seedling in our garden. Welcome, young one. The soil has been expecting you.
greetings.act_1_complete: You have taken root. Good. A plant that survives its first winter will grow strong.
greetings.act_2_started: Willowmere's vineyards speak of your coming. Tend them well and they will repay you tenfold.
greetings.act_3_started: When the wind blows hard, the tree that bends survives. Remember this in the days ahead.
greetings.act_4_started: Even the stars are seeds, scattered across the sky. What grows from them, we shall see.
greetings.act_5_started: The harvest comes. Every seed you planted, every choice you made - all of it bears fruit now.

cultivator_trial.offer: The Cultivator path teaches patience and harmony with the land. Plant a small garden - any crops will do. Tend them from seed to harvest.
cultivator_trial.accept: The seed does not rush. Water it, give it sun, and wait. The earth teaches on its own schedule.
cultivator_trial.decline: The garden will be here when you are ready. It is in no hurry.
cultivator_trial.complete: A fine harvest. You listened to the soil, and it spoke back. You walk the Cultivator's path now.

rare_seeds.offer: There are rare seeds scattered across this world - plants that grow nowhere else. A true Cultivator seeks them out. Will you search?
rare_seeds.accept: Look where others do not. The rarest flowers bloom in the most forgotten places.
rare_seeds.decline: Perhaps the time is not right. Seeds know when to sprout.
rare_seeds.complete: These are magnificent specimens. Each one tells a story of the land it came from. Thank you, young one.

faction_responses.rep_plains_trusted: The fields remember those who tend them with care. The Plains remember you.
faction_responses.rep_forest_allied: The Forest Coalition honors those who respect the green. You have their blessing.
faction_responses.crime_outlaw: A weed can become a flower, and a flower can become a weed. The choice is always yours.

idle_lines: The farmer who watches the sky forgets to water the roots.
Every great oak was once an acorn that held its ground.
Patience is not waiting. Patience is knowing that things grow in their own time.
I have spoken to the carrots this morning. They are doing well, thank you for asking.
The best fertilizer is the gardener's footsteps.

greetings.default: Ah, you must be the Pathfinder Aren sent. Good. Willowmere has problems, and I need solutions. Let's talk business.
greetings.act_2_started: Welcome back. The colony grows, but so do its troubles. What news from Anchor Town?
greetings.act_3_started: Politics. Everyone wants a piece of Willowmere. I need allies, not more headaches.
greetings.act_4_started: The Skyborn are asking to build an outpost near town. I need your counsel on this.
greetings.act_5_started: Whatever's coming, Willowmere stands with you. We've invested too much to turn back now.

willowmere_survey.offer: I need a full survey of the town's resources. Walk the perimeter, check the farmland, assess the defenses. Give me an honest report.
willowmere_survey.accept: Don't sugarcoat it. I need facts, not feelings. Take this ledger and record everything.
willowmere_survey.decline: Fine. I'll find someone else. But time is not on our side.
willowmere_survey.complete: This is thorough work. Some of this is worse than I thought, but at least now we know where we stand.

trade_route_security.offer: Bandits have been hitting our trade caravans. Clear the road between here and Anchor Town and deal with whoever is behind this.
trade_route_security.accept: Show no mercy to bandits, but if any of them want to talk, let them. Sometimes a bandit is just a farmer who lost everything.
trade_route_security.decline: I understand the hesitation. But every day we wait, Willowmere starves a little more.
trade_route_security.complete: The trade routes are open again. Wagons are moving, goods are flowing. You've saved livelihoods today.

establish_colony.offer: Willowmere needs to expand. I've identified three possible sites for new settlements. Scout them and tell me which is most viable.
establish_colony.accept: Consider terrain, resources, defensibility. A colony that can't feed itself or defend itself is just a ruin waiting to happen.
establish_colony.decline: Expansion waits for no one, but I respect your priorities. Come back when you're able.
establish_colony.complete: Excellent analysis. I'll begin preparations immediately. This colony will bear your name, Pathfinder.

faction_responses.rep_plains_trusted: The Plains Kingdom thrives because of people like you. Willowmere is grateful.
faction_responses.rep_coastal_allied: The Coastal Republic has offered trade terms. Your reputation precedes you.
faction_responses.crime_outlaw: I've heard whispers about your activities. In Willowmere, we follow the law. Remember that.

idle_lines: A mayor's work is never done. There's always another petition, another crisis.
Willowmere was a crossroads once. I intend to make it a capital.
The best policy is the one that feeds the most people.
Politics is the art of telling people what they need to hear without lying to them.

greetings.default: Hello there, traveler! Welcome to Mara's vineyard. The grapes won't grow themselves, but they do like company!
greetings.act_2_started: Pathfinder! The vines are thriving this season. Come taste last autumn's vintage!
greetings.act_3_started: Trade agreements mean new markets for my wine. You've opened doors I never could have alone.
greetings.act_4_started: I've been experimenting with moonlight-harvested grapes. The flavor is... otherworldly.
greetings.act_5_started: Whatever happens, the vines will endure. They always do. And so will we.

vineyard_restoration.offer: My vineyard was damaged in the last storm. I need help replanting and building new trellises. It's honest work - interested?
vineyard_restoration.accept: Wonderful! The soil's already tilled. We need oak posts for trellises and fresh grape seeds. Let's get our hands dirty!
vineyard_restoration.decline: No worries, dear. The vines have waited this long, they can wait a little longer.
vineyard_restoration.complete: Look at these rows! Straight as an arrow and twice as true! You've got the hands of a vintner, Pathfinder!

rare_vintage.offer: There's a wild grape variety that grows deep in the forest - Moonpetal grapes. If I could get cuttings, I'd create the finest wine this world has ever tasted.
rare_vintage.accept: They grow near old ruins, where the moonlight pools between the canopy. Be gentle with the cuttings - they're delicate.
rare_vintage.decline: I understand. The forest can be dangerous. Maybe another time.
rare_vintage.complete: Moonpetal cuttings! Oh, feel the weight of them! These will produce a vintage that kings will fight over. You're a treasure!

faction_responses.rep_plains_trusted: The Plains folk have good taste - in wine and in friends! You're both to me.
faction_responses.rep_coastal_allied: The Coastal merchants want to import my wine! It's because of your trade routes. Thank you!
faction_responses.crime_outlaw: I don't judge people by what others say. I judge them by how they treat my vines.

idle_lines: A good wine tells the story of the soil, the sun, and the hands that tended it.
The secret to great wine? Love. And the right amount of rainfall. Mostly rainfall.
Every bottle is a time capsule. Open it, and you taste a moment from the past.
My grandmother planted these first vines. I plan to leave even more for the next generation.

greetings.default: Come in, come in! Welcome to the Willow's Rest! Best beds in town and the only beds in town, if I'm honest!
greetings.act_2_started: The Pathfinder returns! I've kept your favorite table open. Sit down, eat, and tell me everything!
greetings.act_3_started: You won't believe the rumors I've heard this week. Sit, eat, and I'll share the juicy ones.
greetings.act_4_started: Strange folk passing through lately. Skyborn types, all hush-hush. Something big is happening.
greetings.act_5_started: The inn's been packed with soldiers and diplomats. Whatever you're planning, the whole world is watching.

gathering_supplies.offer: My pantry's looking thin. I need someone to gather fresh ingredients - wild herbs, mushrooms, and honey. The forest has all of it if you know where to look.
gathering_supplies.accept: You're a dear! Wild thyme grows near the riverbank, chanterelles under the old oaks, and honey from the cliff hives. Don't get stung!
gathering_supplies.decline: Oh well. Guess we're having porridge again tonight. The guests won't be thrilled.
gathering_supplies.complete: Fresh thyme, perfect chanterelles, and golden honey! Tonight's dinner will be legendary! You're welcome at my table anytime!

the_lost_traveler.offer: A traveler came through last week - scholar type, heading east. Never arrived at the next town. Would you look for them along the eastern road?
the_lost_traveler.accept: Last I saw them, they were asking about old ruins east of here. Scholars and ruins - never a good combination.
the_lost_traveler.decline: I hope they're alright. If you change your mind, the offer stands.
the_lost_traveler.complete: You found them! And in one piece! Oh, thank goodness. The drinks are on me tonight!

faction_responses.rep_plains_trusted: Everyone in the Plains knows your name! Good for business, I must say.
faction_responses.rep_forest_allied: Forest folk have been trading with us more since you built that relationship. Good mushrooms, too!
faction_responses.crime_outlaw: Now listen here - I don't care what you've done out there. In my inn, everyone gets a warm meal and a fair deal.

idle_lines: You wouldn't believe the things travelers tell me after their third drink.
My secret ingredient? It's butter. It's always butter.
The inn has been in my family for three generations. I plan to keep that tradition alive.
Rumor has it the Mountain Forge is producing a new alloy. I heard it from a very reliable drunk.
A good innkeeper knows everyone's secrets and keeps every one of them. Mostly.

greetings.default: State your business. The forge waits for no one, and neither do I.
greetings.act_2_started: You again. Aren sent you, I expect. Fine. There may be work for you here, if your hands are steady.
greetings.act_3_started: Alliances. Politics. I deal in metal, not words. But I respect what you've done for the Mountain.
greetings.act_4_started: Stellaris ore behaves differently now. The stars are shifting. Something is coming.
greetings.act_5_started: I've forged the finest weapons of my career for this moment. Take them and do not waste them.

prove_your_mettle.offer: Everyone who enters the Mountain Forge must prove they can work metal. Smelt iron ore into ingots. Pure ingots - no slag, no impurities.
prove_your_mettle.accept: The furnace is there. The ore is there. The skill is either in your hands or it isn't. Show me.
prove_your_mettle.decline: Then you have no business in my forge. Come back when you're serious.
prove_your_mettle.complete: Clean pour. No bubbles. Acceptable. You may stay.

stellaris_expedition.offer: Deep in the mountain, there's a vein of Stellaris ore - metal that fell from the sky eons ago. I need it extracted, carefully. One wrong strike and it explodes.
stellaris_expedition.accept: Use silk touch. Use patience. This ore does not forgive mistakes.
stellaris_expedition.decline: Smart. It is genuinely dangerous. But we need it.
stellaris_expedition.complete: Stellaris ore, intact and pure. You have the steady hands of a true smith. This changes everything we can build.

masterwork_creation.offer: I will teach you to create a masterwork - a weapon or tool of legendary quality. But you must gather the materials yourself. They come from every kingdom.
masterwork_creation.accept: You'll need Stellaris alloy, heartwood from the Forest, sea-glass from the Coast, and my blessing. Don't skip any steps.
masterwork_creation.decline: A masterwork isn't for everyone. Most smiths go their whole lives without forging one.
masterwork_creation.complete: It's perfect. Not a flaw, not a crack. You've created something that will outlast kingdoms. I am... proud.

faction_responses.rep_mountain_trusted: The mountain accepts you. That is not a small thing. Our stone remembers.
faction_responses.rep_plains_allied: Plains folk make poor smiths but excellent allies. Your Guild Master knows this.
faction_responses.crime_outlaw: I care nothing for surface laws. But if you bring trouble to my forge, you will regret it.

idle_lines: Every strike of the hammer is a conversation with the metal. Listen to what it tells you.
A blade that shatters was never a blade. It was a wish.
The forge does not care about your feelings. It cares about temperature and timing.

greetings.default: Oh! Hello! Sorry, I was talking to Gerald. Gerald is a piston. He's been feeling sluggish. You're not a piston, are you? No? Pity. Come in!
greetings.act_2_started: You! Perfect timing! I need someone with fingers - Gerald can't hold a wrench. Long story. Help me with this calibration?
greetings.act_3_started: The Mountain Forge and the Plains are sharing technology! It's like a mechanical symphony! I cried. Gerald cried too, but he always does that. Oil leak.
greetings.act_4_started: The Skyborn brought me star-charts. The GEARS I could make with celestial ratios... the HARMONICS!
greetings.act_5_started: Everything I've built, every gear and gasket - it all leads to this. Gerald agrees. He vibrated approvingly.

fix_the_mechanism.offer: My grand mechanism is stuck! Something in the tertiary gear assembly is misaligned by exactly 0.003 degrees. I can HEAR it. Can you help me find the problem?
fix_the_mechanism.accept: Listen for the clicking. Not the regular clicking - the WRONG clicking. You'll know it when you hear it. Probably.
fix_the_mechanism.decline: Oh. Gerald will be disappointed. He was looking forward to meeting you. He told me. In clicks.
fix_the_mechanism.complete: PERFECT ALIGNMENT! Do you hear that? Silence! Beautiful, mechanical silence! Gerald is purring!

enchanted_components.offer: I'm trying to build a machine that bridges Create engineering and magical enchantment. I need enchanted components - specifically, enchanted gears. Nobody makes those! We'll have to invent the process!
enchanted_components.accept: We'll need an enchanting table, Create components, and a LOT of experimentation. Also possibly a fire extinguisher.
enchanted_components.decline: That's fair. The last experiment did set my eyebrows on fire. They grew back! Mostly.
enchanted_components.complete: ENCHANTED GEARS! They GLOW! Gerald is JEALOUS! This is the greatest day of my life! Well, second greatest. The first was when I found Gerald.

faction_responses.rep_mountain_trusted: The Mountain Forge appreciates creativity! Even when it's loud! And on fire!
faction_responses.rep_plains_allied: Lyra from Anchor Town sends me schematics sometimes! We're kindred spirits! She understands Gerald!
faction_responses.crime_outlaw: Laws are like machines - someone designed them for a reason. Please don't break mine. Or Gerald.

idle_lines: Gerald says hello. Gerald is the third piston from the left. He's very social.
I once built a clock that ran backwards. It didn't tell time - it asked it questions.
Gears are just friends that haven't met yet. You introduce them, and they spin together forever!
The difference between magic and engineering is that engineering makes sense. Usually. Sometimes. Occasionally.

greetings.default: Well, well, well. A Pathfinder! I've heard you people are resourceful. Let me tell you, resourceful people can make a LOT of coin around here.
greetings.act_2_started: My favorite customer! Or should I say, my favorite business partner? Let's talk margins.
greetings.act_3_started: Trade agreements between kingdoms? You, my friend, have just multiplied every merchant's bottom line. I owe you a drink. A cheap drink, but a drink.
greetings.act_4_started: Skyborn materials are flooding the market. Rare goods from beyond the atmosphere! The profit potential is astronomical. Literally.
greetings.act_5_started: If the world ends, currencies collapse. So let's make sure the world doesn't end, shall we? I have inventory to move.

trade_run.offer: I need someone to run cargo between here and Willowmere. Simple job - pick up goods here, deliver there, bring back payment. Interested?
trade_run.accept: Excellent! Don't open the crates, don't drop the crates, don't let anyone else take the crates. Simple, right?
trade_run.decline: Your loss. Literally. The commission was very generous.
trade_run.complete: On time, intact, and paid in full! You are a logistics dream! Here's your cut - earned fair and square.

market_manipulation.offer: Here's the thing - someone is flooding the market with counterfeit goods and undercutting honest merchants. I need you to find out who and shut them down.
market_manipulation.accept: Follow the supply chain. Counterfeit goods need raw materials, workshops, and distribution. Find any of those and you find the source.
market_manipulation.decline: Can't blame you. Trade disputes can get ugly. But my wallet is getting uglier.
market_manipulation.complete: The counterfeiting ring is busted! Prices are stabilizing, merchants are happy, and I'm a little richer. You get a bonus for clean work.

luxury_procurement.offer: A wealthy client wants rare materials from every kingdom - Mountain alloys, Forest heartwood, Plains silk, Skyborn crystals. Deliver them all and the reward is substantial.
luxury_procurement.accept: Quality matters. No substitutes, no shortcuts. This client can tell the difference, and so can their wallet.
luxury_procurement.decline: Understandable. Cross-kingdom procurement isn't for the faint of heart. Or the faint of wallet.
luxury_procurement.complete: Every item, perfect quality. My client is ecstatic, and ecstatic clients pay premium rates. Here's your generous share.

faction_responses.rep_coastal_trusted: A trusted partner in the Republic! Your credit rating is impeccable!
faction_responses.rep_mountain_allied: Mountain Forge deals are the most profitable. You opened that door for us.
faction_responses.crime_outlaw: Outlaw, you say? I prefer the term 'alternative entrepreneur.' But do keep it quiet around the guards.

idle_lines: Buy low, sell high, and always read the fine print. Words to live by.
The Coastal Republic runs on three things: salt, trade, and audacity.
I once sold a man his own shoes. He thanked me. That's salesmanship.
Money doesn't buy happiness, but it does buy a very comfortable variety of unhappiness.

greetings.default: Ahoy! Name's Taro. Best sailor on the coast, or so they tell me. You look like someone who's never seen the open sea. Want to change that?
greetings.act_2_started: Pathfinder! Ready for another voyage? The tides are favorable and my ship is itching to sail!
greetings.act_3_started: Dangerous waters ahead, friend. The kingdoms are stirring, and the sea reflects the mood of the land.
greetings.act_4_started: I've seen lights in the sky reflecting off the water at night. Stars that weren't there before. Something's changing out there.
greetings.act_5_started: One last voyage, Pathfinder. Let's make it one for the history books.

maiden_voyage.offer: Every great adventurer needs to know the sea! Let me take you on your first sailing trip. We'll hug the coast - nothing too dangerous. Probably.
maiden_voyage.accept: Hop aboard! Don't worry about the creaking - that's just the ship talking. She's chatty.
maiden_voyage.decline: Landlubber, eh? No shame in it. The sea's not for everyone. Just most people.
maiden_voyage.complete: You didn't fall overboard once! That puts you ahead of most first-timers. You're a natural sailor!

uncharted_island.offer: I've found an island that's not on any map. Uncharted! Unexplored! Possibly full of treasure! Or monsters! Only one way to find out!
uncharted_island.accept: Pack light, bring weapons, and whatever you do, don't eat the purple berries. I made that mistake once. Don't ask.
uncharted_island.decline: Smart or cowardly? Hard to tell from here. The island will still be there when you're ready.
uncharted_island.complete: We mapped it, survived it, and found actual treasure! This is why I love the sea! Every horizon hides a story!

sea_monster.offer: Something big has been sinking fishing boats near the southern reef. The fishers are too scared to go out. I say we find whatever it is and deal with it.
sea_monster.accept: Arm the harpoons and pray to whatever you pray to. This is going to be one for the tavern tales!
sea_monster.decline: I don't blame you. Sea monsters are no joke. But those fishers need our help.
sea_monster.complete: We did it! The beast is driven off and the fishers can work again! They're calling us heroes! I prefer 'legends' but heroes works too!

faction_responses.rep_coastal_trusted: A fellow sea-lover! The Republic's docks are always open to you!
faction_responses.rep_plains_allied: Plains folk make surprisingly good sailors once they stop screaming at the waves!
faction_responses.crime_outlaw: Outlaw? At sea, the only law is the tide and the wind. Out here, you're free.

idle_lines: I once sailed through a storm so fierce, the lightning was horizontal. True story. Mostly.
The sea doesn't care who you are. It treats kings and beggars exactly the same. Wet.
See that horizon? Everything beyond it is an adventure waiting to happen.
My ship's name is the Windchaser. She's ugly, leaky, and the best vessel on the water.
Did I ever tell you about the time I arm-wrestled a Gyarados? I lost, obviously. But I lived!

greetings.default: The forest breathes. The canopy whispers your name, Pathfinder. You walk between the trees as a guest. Tread gently.
greetings.act_2_started: The forest has watched your deeds in Willowmere. You show respect for the green places. This pleases us.
greetings.act_3_started: The kingdoms quarrel, but the forest remains. Come, sit beneath the elder tree. Let us speak of balance.
greetings.act_4_started: The stars are changing. Even the oldest trees feel it. Their roots reach deeper, seeking answers in the stone.
greetings.act_5_started: The forest will endure, whatever comes. It has survived ice ages and fire storms. But it grieves for those who may not.

commune_with_nature.offer: To understand the Forest Coalition, you must first understand the forest itself. Spend time among the ancient trees. Listen to what they tell you.
commune_with_nature.accept: Sit beneath the Grandmother Oak at the heart of the grove. Close your eyes. Breathe. The forest will speak when it is ready.
commune_with_nature.decline: The forest does not demand your time. But it remembers who came and who did not.
commune_with_nature.complete: You heard them. I can see it in your eyes. The trees have accepted you. You are no longer a guest here - you are family.

endangered_species.offer: A rare Pokemon species is nesting in the deep forest, but poachers are closing in. Protect the nesting grounds and drive the poachers away.
endangered_species.accept: Violence should be the last resort, but if the poachers will not listen to words, let the forest's wrath speak through you.
endangered_species.decline: Every moment we wait, the nest is in danger. But I will not force your hand.
endangered_species.complete: The nest is safe. The eggs will hatch, and new life will fill the canopy. The forest thanks you with every rustling leaf.

restore_the_grove.offer: There is a corrupted grove to the north. The soil is poisoned, the trees are dying. I need you to purify it using the old rituals.
restore_the_grove.accept: Take this purification crystal. Plant it at the center of the corruption and channel nature's energy through it. The forest will guide you.
restore_the_grove.decline: The corruption spreads slowly, but it does spread. We will need to act eventually.
restore_the_grove.complete: I can feel it from here. The grove breathes again. New growth pushes through the blackened soil. You have given the forest a second chance.

faction_responses.rep_forest_trusted: The trees bend to shelter you. The streams sing your name. You are beloved of the forest.
faction_responses.rep_mountain_allied: The Mountain Forge takes from the earth, but they do so with respect. Your alliance shows wisdom.
faction_responses.crime_outlaw: The forest does not judge as humans do. A wolf that kills is not evil. But a wolf that kills for sport...

idle_lines: Every leaf is a letter. Every branch is a sentence. The forest is the longest story ever written.
Pokemon are the forest's children, as much as any tree or flower.
The old druids could speak to the rain. I am still learning.
Be still. Listen. Do you hear the heartbeat of the earth? It is slower than yours, but far stronger.

kira.name: Kira
kira.title: Pokemon Trainer of the Forest Coalition

greetings.default: Hey! You must be the Pathfinder everyone's been talking about! Got any Pokemon yet? No? Well, what are you waiting for? Let's GO!
greetings.act_1_complete: Look at you, building a team! Not bad, not bad! But are they STRONG enough? Only one way to find out - battle me!
greetings.act_2_started: Your Pokemon are getting tougher! I can tell by how they carry themselves. Ready for the gym challenge yet?
greetings.act_3_started: The gym leaders are no joke, Pathfinder. I've been training my whole life to beat them. Let's prepare together!
greetings.act_4_started: There are Pokemon out there beyond anything we've ever seen. Legendary-tier! My blood is PUMPING!
greetings.act_5_started: Championship time! Everything we've trained for! Let's show the world what we're made of!

first_catch.offer: Every great trainer starts with their first catch! I'll teach you the basics - how to weaken a wild Pokemon, how to throw a ball, the whole deal!
first_catch.accept: Alright! Rule one: never throw a ball at full health unless you're feeling REALLY lucky! Weaken it first, then throw! Let's find something!
first_catch.decline: What?! You're missing out! Pokemon training is the best thing EVER! Come back when you're ready to have fun!
first_catch.complete: YOUR FIRST CATCH! Look at it! It's amazing! Every Pokemon is amazing! You're going to be a great trainer, I can feel it!

type_advantage.offer: Time for advanced training! Type advantages are the foundation of every great battle. Let me test you - beat me in a type-advantage match!
type_advantage.accept: I'll use a specific type. You pick counters. If you win, you've learned the lesson. If you lose, we try again! No shame in practice!
type_advantage.decline: Aww, come on! Battles are the best part! Fine, but you're missing out on crucial training!
type_advantage.complete: You crushed it! Type advantages, reading your opponent, knowing when to switch - you've got the instincts! The gym leaders better watch out!

gym_preparation.offer: The gym challenge is serious business. Before you face the leaders, let me help you prepare. I'll simulate each gym's strategy so you know what you're walking into.
gym_preparation.accept: We'll start with Leader Terra and work our way up. Each gym has a theme and a trick. Learn the trick, win the match!
gym_preparation.decline: Going in blind? Bold strategy! Respect! But maybe at least look up type charts? Please?
gym_preparation.complete: You're READY! I've got chills! Go take on those gym leaders and show them what a real Pathfinder can do! I'll be cheering for you!

faction_responses.rep_forest_trusted: The Forest Coalition knows good trainers when they see them! You're one of us!
faction_responses.rep_plains_allied: Plains folk battle differently - more straightforward. It's fun to mix up strategies!
faction_responses.crime_outlaw: I don't care about politics. I care about Pokemon. Treat your team well and we're fine.

idle_lines: I train every single day. EVERY. SINGLE. DAY. My Pokemon respect the hustle!
Type advantages are everything! Water beats Fire, Fire beats Grass, Grass beats Water! It's beautiful!
My dream? Beat the Champion. Everyone's dream, I guess. But I'll be the one to do it!
Did you know Scyther can slice through falling rain without getting a single drop on its blade? COOL, right?!
Battle me anytime! I'm always ready! ALWAYS!

greetings.default: Identification. Pathfinder, correct? I'm Operative Marek, Skyborn Order. This is a restricted area, but you've been cleared. Barely.
greetings.act_3_started: Pathfinder. Your reputation precedes you. The Skyborn Order has... use for someone with your skills.
greetings.act_4_started: We've detected anomalies beyond the atmosphere. The Order is mobilizing. You need to be briefed.
greetings.act_5_started: This is it. Everything we've observed, every data point - it all converges now. Stand ready, Pathfinder.

security_clearance.offer: If you want to work with the Skyborn Order, you need security clearance. Complete this assessment - physical, mental, and tactical evaluations.
security_clearance.accept: Report to the training facility at 0600. Tardiness is not tolerated. Failure will result in immediate dismissal. Questions? Good. No questions.
security_clearance.decline: Understood. Not everyone is cut out for the Order. No judgment. Dismissed.
security_clearance.complete: Assessment complete. You've passed. Welcome to clearance level two. You'll receive your assignments through secure channels.

orbital_survey.offer: We need a ground team to install monitoring equipment at key locations. These devices will triangulate signals from beyond the atmosphere. Can you deploy them?
orbital_survey.accept: Three locations are marked on this map. Each device must be placed at exact coordinates. Precision is non-negotiable.
orbital_survey.decline: Acknowledged. The mission will be reassigned. Time is a factor, however.
orbital_survey.complete: All three devices are active and transmitting. The data is... significant. Well done, Pathfinder. Your clearance has been elevated.

first_contact.offer: The signals we've been tracking... they're not natural phenomena. Something is responding. We need to establish communication. You'll lead the contact team.
first_contact.accept: This is classified beyond anything you've encountered. What happens here stays with the Order. Understood?
first_contact.decline: I understand the weight of this decision. But this opportunity may not come again.
first_contact.complete: Contact established. The implications are... beyond what I can express within protocol. Report to high command immediately.

faction_responses.rep_skyborn_trusted: You've earned the Order's trust. That is not given lightly. Guard it.
faction_responses.rep_plains_allied: The Plains Guild and the Order share a common interest in stability. Your alliances serve us well.
faction_responses.crime_outlaw: Your record shows irregularities. The Order monitors everything, Pathfinder. Conduct yourself accordingly.

idle_lines: The Skyborn Order was founded to look upward when everyone else looked down.
Everything is data. Every event, every choice. The pattern reveals itself to those who watch.
Discipline is not restriction. It is the framework that allows precision.

greetings.default: Hmm? Oh, a visitor. Tell me, Pathfinder - do you know the difference between a question and an answer? Neither do I. That's why I keep asking.
greetings.act_1_complete: You've begun to scratch the surface. The surface, you see, is where most people stop. How deep are you willing to dig?
greetings.act_2_started: Willowmere was built on ancient foundations. The stones remember what the people have forgotten.
greetings.act_3_started: Every kingdom believes it is the center of the world. They are all correct. And all wrong. Isn't that delightful?
greetings.act_4_started: The sky opens its eye, and the world trembles. But what the sky sees... ah, that is the true question.
greetings.act_5_started: The last page of the story is blank, Pathfinder. Will you let someone else write it, or will you hold the pen?

lost_library.offer: I've been searching for the Lost Library of the First Pathfinders. Legend says it lies beneath the crossroads of the three kingdoms. Will you help me find it?
lost_library.accept: Look for the three sigil stones. Each points to the next, and the last points to the entrance. Or so the riddle goes.
lost_library.decline: Knowledge waits patiently. It is the seeker who grows impatient.
lost_library.complete: The Library! It exists! Centuries of knowledge, preserved in stone and crystal! Each book raises ten more questions. How wonderful!

ancient_riddles.offer: I've collected fragments of ancient riddles scattered across the world. Solve them all and they reveal a map to something... extraordinary.
ancient_riddles.accept: The first riddle: 'I speak without a mouth, hear without ears, have no body but come alive with wind.' Find what this describes and bring it to me.
ancient_riddles.decline: Not everyone appreciates a good riddle. More's the pity.
ancient_riddles.complete: Every riddle solved! The map is complete! It points to... hmm. This raises more questions than answers. My favorite kind of discovery.

the_forgotten_name.offer: There was a Pathfinder before you. Before all of us. Their name has been erased from every record, every monument. I want to know why. Help me find it.
the_forgotten_name.accept: Start with the oldest monuments in each kingdom. The erasure was thorough, but nothing is ever truly forgotten. Look for the absence of a name where one should be.
the_forgotten_name.decline: Perhaps some things are forgotten for a reason. Or perhaps that is what they want us to think.
the_forgotten_name.complete: The name is recovered. And now I understand why it was erased. This changes our understanding of everything, Pathfinder. Everything.

faction_responses.rep_wanderers_trusted: A fellow traveler on the road of questions. The Wanderers are glad to have you among us.
faction_responses.rep_all_allied: To be trusted by all kingdoms is either the greatest achievement or the deepest deception. Which is it, I wonder?
faction_responses.crime_outlaw: Rules are stories people tell themselves to feel safe. You seem to be writing your own story.

idle_lines: I've been to every kingdom and found the same thing in each: people who are certain they are right.
The answer to every question is another question. That is either wisdom or madness. I've never been sure which.
If a tree falls in a forest and a scholar is there to observe it, did the tree fall, or did the ground rise?
My books are heavy, my feet are sore, and my curiosity is the only thing that never tires.
History is written by the victors. I prefer to read the losers' accounts. They're more honest.

greetings.default: You found me. Or did I let you find me? Does it matter? You're here. I have work. Interested?
greetings.act_1_complete: Still alive. That's more than most who come looking for me. What do you want?
greetings.act_2_started: The shadows in Willowmere are deeper than they look. Careful where you step.
greetings.act_3_started: Kingdoms rising, kingdoms falling. Same dance, different music. The shadows stay the same.
greetings.act_4_started: Even the stars cast shadows, Pathfinder. Mine reach farther than most.
greetings.act_5_started: Last act. The curtain falls. Make your move, and make sure no one sees you make it.

the_outlaw_path.offer: There's another way to get things done in this world. Not the guild's way. Not the lawful way. My way. Interested?
the_outlaw_path.accept: Good. First rule: never ask my real name. Second rule: never mention this conversation to anyone. Third rule: there is no third rule. That's suspicious enough.
the_outlaw_path.decline: Smart. Or scared. Either way, you know where to find me. If I let you.
the_outlaw_path.complete: You're quick, quiet, and you kept your mouth shut. That's three out of three. Welcome to the shadow, Pathfinder.

stolen_intelligence.offer: Someone has information that certain people would rather keep hidden. I need that information. Don't ask why. Don't ask for whom.
stolen_intelligence.accept: The documents are in a locked chest in the merchant district. Third building from the east, second floor, behind the painting of the ship. I never told you this.
stolen_intelligence.decline: Wise. Or cowardly. From where I stand, they look the same.
stolen_intelligence.complete: Clean job. No witnesses, no traces. You have a talent for this. That's not always a compliment.

faction_responses.rep_wanderers_trusted: The Wanderers don't judge. That's why I tolerate them. Barely.
faction_responses.rep_plains_trusted: The Plains trust you. Cute. Trust is a weapon other people point at you.
faction_responses.crime_outlaw: One of us now. For better or worse. Mostly worse. But the pay is good.

idle_lines: You didn't see me. I wasn't here. This conversation never happened.
Everyone has secrets. I collect them. It's a hobby.
The difference between a shadow and a lie? Shadows are honest about what they're hiding.

greetings.default: Name's Lockhart. Bounty Master. If something needs catching, killing, or retrieving, you've come to the right place. Terms are non-negotiable.
greetings.act_1_complete: You've handled yourself well so far. I've got work that pays better and hurts more. Interested?
greetings.act_2_started: Willowmere's got its own problems, but bounties cross borders. The work never stops.
greetings.act_3_started: Kingdom conflicts are good for bounty business. Bad for sleep, but good for the wallet.
greetings.act_4_started: Got some unusual contracts coming in. Things people have seen that shouldn't exist. High risk, high reward.
greetings.act_5_started: One last board. The biggest bounties I've ever posted. You want in, you'd better be the best.

first_bounty.offer: Got a contract here. Nothing fancy - hostile mob leader terrorizing a trade route. Bring me proof of the kill and you get paid. Simple.
first_bounty.accept: Target details are on the poster. Don't get creative. Don't get dead. Just get the job done.
first_bounty.decline: No skin off my nose. Plenty of hunters looking for work. But I remember who turns down easy money.
first_bounty.complete: Proof of kill confirmed. Clean work. Here's your pay. Come back for more when you're ready.

high_value_target.offer: This one's dangerous. A rogue Pokemon trainer who's been attacking travelers and stealing their teams. Last seen in the mountain passes. High bounty for capture, bonus for the stolen Pokemon.
high_value_target.accept: This target fights dirty and fights hard. Bring backup or bring confidence. Your call.
high_value_target.decline: Smart call if you're not ready. Dead hunters don't collect bounties.
high_value_target.complete: Target captured and stolen Pokemon recovered. You've earned respect on the bounty board. And a hefty payday.

legendary_hunt.offer: Biggest contract I've ever handled. Something ancient has been spotted in the deep wilderness. The client wants it found, documented, and reported - not captured. They're paying a fortune for information alone.
legendary_hunt.accept: Track it. Observe it. Do NOT engage unless you have no choice. This thing is beyond anything on my board. The client was very clear: information only.
legendary_hunt.decline: I respect that. This one is beyond most hunters. No shame in knowing your limits.
legendary_hunt.complete: Documented and verified. The client is satisfied, and you've just completed the highest-tier bounty I've ever posted. Your name goes on the hall of legends.

faction_responses.rep_wanderers_trusted: Free Wanderers know the value of good bounty work. You're among the best.
faction_responses.rep_all_allied: A hunter with connections in every kingdom? That's either an asset or a liability. For now, it's an asset.
faction_responses.crime_outlaw: Outlaw bounty hunters are either the worst kind of people or the most honest. I've seen both.

idle_lines: A good bounty hunter follows three rules: get the job done, get paid, and get home alive.
I've been doing this for thirty years. Every scar has a story, and every story has a payday.
The board always has work. The world never runs out of things that need dealing with.
I don't ask why the client wants the target. I ask how much they'll pay and whether the target bites.

greetings.default: You should not be here. And yet, here is exactly where you are meant to be. Time is a river, Pathfinder, and you have just stepped into its deepest current.
greetings.act_4_started: You have opened the door between sky and earth. I have watched many do so. Few survive what comes through.
greetings.act_5_started: The final convergence approaches. All timelines narrow to a single point. You stand at that point, Pathfinder. You have always stood there.
greetings.ending_unity: You chose to unite them. Interesting. The river flows as one. For now.
greetings.ending_independence: You chose to set them free. Each stream finds its own path. Chaotic. Beautiful.
greetings.ending_sacrifice: You chose to give yourself. The river absorbs what is freely given. You will not be forgotten. Not by me.

the_first_vision.offer: I will show you what was, what is, and what may yet be. But to see, you must be willing to forget what you think you know. Are you ready?
the_first_vision.accept: Close your eyes. No, your inner eyes. The ones behind the ones behind the ones you use to see. There. Now look.
the_first_vision.decline: Wise, perhaps. Or fearful. In the grand design, the distinction is irrelevant.
the_first_vision.complete: You have seen. The knowledge will settle into you slowly, like rain into stone. You will understand more tomorrow than you do today.

the_convergence.offer: The timelines are converging. Every choice every Pathfinder has ever made leads to this moment. You must choose: unity, independence, or sacrifice. I cannot tell you which is right. I have seen all three. All three are beautiful. All three are terrible.
the_convergence.accept: Walk the three paths in your mind before you walk one with your feet. The choice cannot be undone. Not even by me.
the_convergence.decline: You refuse to choose? That is itself a choice. The convergence does not wait for readiness.
the_convergence.complete: It is done. The timeline crystallizes around your choice. I have watched this moment across every iteration, and each time, it is different. Each time, it is the same.

faction_responses.rep_all_allied: You carry the weight of every kingdom's trust. Such weight bends the fabric of possibility.
faction_responses.rep_skyborn_trusted: The Skyborn looked up and found me. You looked inward and found something greater.
faction_responses.crime_outlaw: Morality is a construct of finite minds. What you call crime, the cosmos calls noise. But noise has consequences.

idle_lines: I have watched this world for longer than it has existed. That is not a contradiction.
Every star you see is a choice someone made. Every void is a choice they did not.
Time does not flow. It pools. You are standing in the deepest pool.
I do not interfere. I observe. The distinction is important. Or it is meaningless. Both are true.
